channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-12880] PPC client: conf-sanity test_76a: error while apply max_dirty_mb
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for sarah <sarah@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/f9068e78-eb0e-11e9-b62b-52540065bddc

test_76a failed with the following error:

error while apply max_dirty_mb

trevis-55vm1: == rpc test complete, duration -o sec ================================================================ 05:25:19 (1570598719)
trevis-55vm1: trevis-55vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com: executing set_default_debug -1 all 4
CMD: trevis-55vm1 e2label /dev/mapper/ost1_flakey 				2>/dev/null | grep -E ':[a-zA-Z]{3}[0-9]{4}'
CMD: trevis-55vm1 e2label /dev/mapper/ost1_flakey 				2>/dev/null | grep -E ':[a-zA-Z]{3}[0-9]{4}'
CMD: trevis-55vm1 e2label /dev/mapper/ost1_flakey 2>/dev/null
Started lustre-OST0000
mount lustre on /mnt/lustre.....
Starting client: trevis-77vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com:  -o user_xattr,flock trevis-55vm2@tcp:/lustre /mnt/lustre
CMD: trevis-77vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com mkdir -p /mnt/lustre
CMD: trevis-77vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com mount -t lustre -o user_xattr,flock trevis-55vm2@tcp:/lustre /mnt/lustre
Change MGS params
max_dirty_mb: 213
new_max_dirty_mb: 203
...
Waiting 10 secs for update
CMD: trevis-77vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osc.*.max_dirty_mb |
		head -1
CMD: trevis-77vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osc.*.max_dirty_mb |
		head -1
CMD: trevis-77vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osc.*.max_dirty_mb |
		head -1
CMD: trevis-77vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osc.*.max_dirty_mb |
		head -1
CMD: trevis-77vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osc.*.max_dirty_mb |
		head -1
CMD: trevis-77vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osc.*.max_dirty_mb |
		head -1
CMD: trevis-77vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osc.*.max_dirty_mb |
		head -1
CMD: trevis-77vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osc.*.max_dirty_mb |
		head -1
CMD: trevis-77vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osc.*.max_dirty_mb |
		head -1
CMD: trevis-77vm1.trevis.whamcloud.com /usr/sbin/lctl get_param -n osc.*.max_dirty_mb |
		head -1
Update not seen after 90s: wanted '203' got '213'
213
 conf-sanity test_76a: @@@@@@ FAIL: error while apply max_dirty_mb

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
conf-sanity test_76a - error while apply max_dirty_mb
item.summary: PPC client: conf-sanity test_76a: error while apply max_dirty_mb

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
